bodyText:
What is startup due diligence services? Pre-investment due diligence for startups — financial, tax, legal, FEMA compliance, cap table analysis, and valuation.
Startup Due Diligence Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Kerala, Kerala since 2012.
Quick Answer: Startup Due Diligence in Kerala — Pre-investment due diligence for startups — financial, tax, legal, FEMA compliance, cap table analys. From ₹50,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Startup Due Diligence Services in Kerala
Virtual Auditor provides startup due diligence services across Kerala. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Kerala with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Ernakulam handles company registrations and filings for Kerala. Stamp duty: 0.2% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

• Financial Due Diligence
• Tax Due Diligence

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Kerala
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your startup due diligence is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What does startup due diligence cover?
faqs.a: Financial statements review, tax compliance check, FEMA/FDI status, cap table accuracy, related party transactions, and contingent liabilities.

faqs.q: How long does due diligence take?
faqs.a: Standard due diligence: 2-3 weeks. Expedited: 7-10 days. Complex multi-entity: 4-6 weeks.

faqs.q: Do you work with both investors and startups?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent both sides — investors seeking independent assessment, and startups preparing for fundraise.

faqs.q: Do you provide startup due diligence services in Kerala?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Kerala from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Kerala?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Kerala fall under ROC Ernakulam. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Kerala-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Kerala?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Kerala: 0.2% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
